issue: execution_journal.jsonl had 0 lines — spine executes but never records
root_cause: GovernedExecutionSpine.submit() records correctly, but no ActionEnvelopes flow through it in production. The organism daemon ticks run subsystem checks but produce no governed mutations.
fix_applied: Added _record_tick_heartbeat() to daemon.tick() — records a heartbeat journal entry every 60 ticks (~5 minutes). Also conducted diagnostic probe to verify journal write path.
